title: Cosmos Music Box — a rotating pinned cylinder plucking a comb of tuned tines into a gentle melody
title_vi: Cosmos Music Box — trụ xoay có chốt gảy lược thanh ngân tạo giai điệu nhẹ nhàng
summary: A music box on the Phantom-dark theme that makes REAL sound via the Web Audio API: a rotating pinned cylinder whose pins pluck a comb of fourteen tuned tines as it turns, playing a gentle seeded pentatonic melody through soft triangle+sine voices with a short bell decay. Pins approaching the comb's contact point glow, the struck tine vibrates and bursts with chime-glow at its tip, and a little hand crank turns with the drum. All audio is synthesized from oscillators and ramped gain envelopes (master gain ~0.2, no samples) and is created only on the first user gesture so autoplay is never blocked. Self-contained, zero dependencies, with a silent deterministic looping visual demo for capture in which the cylinder rotates an integer number of turns per loop for a seamless cycle.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and CLICK & HOLD to crank — the cylinder speeds up while held and slows back down on release, and you HEAR each pin pluck its tine. Audio needs a user gesture, so the first click starts the AudioContext. KEY TECHNIQUES: each note is a soft triangle plus a sine partial with an exponential attack and a short bell-like decay; pitches are a C-major pentatonic over two octaves (freq = 261.63 * 2**((semi-60)/12)) so the melody is always consonant; strikes fire the instant a pin's angle crosses the comb contact (phase-wrap detection between frames), and crank speed scales note velocity. The visual draws rotation as a pure function: render(u) maps u to an integer ROTS turns so the loop is seamless, with pin glow on approach, tine vibration amplitude from a sharp post-strike decay, and chime bursts. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT and window.__seek(t) is a deterministic visual (steady rotation, no AudioContext). TUNE: LOOP, ROTS (integer turns per loop), the PINS melody walk, NT tines, the bell decay times, master gain (0.2), and the accent palette.
summary_vi: Hộp nhạc trên nền Phantom-dark phát ÂM THANH THẬT qua Web Audio API: trụ xoay gắn chốt, khi quay các chốt gảy vào lược mười bốn thanh ngân so dây tạo giai điệu ngũ cung nhẹ nhàng bằng tiếng triangle+sine với đuôi ngân ngắn. Chốt sắp chạm lược thì sáng lên, thanh bị gảy rung và bừng sáng ở đầu, kèm tay quay xoay theo trụ. Tự chứa, không phụ thuộc, kèm demo hình ảnh lặp liền mạch và im lặng để chụp.
notes: Mở index.html, bấm giữ để quay tay (quay nhanh hơn) và nghe tiếng ngân; chế độ ?auto=1 im lặng, quay đủ số vòng nguyên mỗi loop để lặp liền mạch khi chụp.
